    Admission

    Adult.......................$19

    Senior (65+)............$17

    Military/Veteran....$15

    Child (4-12).............$12

    Child (under 4)........Free

    ​

    Admission can be purchased in-person at the Visitor Center

    or online using the event ticket below. Admission is valid all day.
